name: Tuna Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together tuna, 1/4 cup mushroom soup, 1/2 cup bread crumbs, onion and egg.
2. Form 6 patties and coat with remaining bread crumbs.
3. Cook over medium heat in skillet coated with cooking spray, about 5 to 7 minutes on each side.
4. For sauce, blend together remaining soup, milk and mayonnaise. Cook over medium heat until sauce is hot, about 5 minutes.
5. Spoon sauce over croquettes to serve.
